failures.description: The agent misread or misreasoned over the ProductCatalogSearch result, choosing item 1507389580 at $1157.86 even though item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone. The correct tool call was made and returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer from this tool output but selected the higher-priced item as the cheapest. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the same wrong answer despite noting the lower-priced alternative.
